---
title: "Changes from the pre-registration"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    grid:
      body-width: 900px
editor: source
---

Here, we describe all changes from the [pre-registration](https://osf.io/v8sgf/files/tp8h3) to the manuscript. Note that the pre-registration is available as a PDF in the "files" section of the OSF registration.

## All Research Questions

### Major Changes

* Participation time points 2, 7, and 14 were dropped from all analyses because not all participants were eligible to participate at these time points.
* We dropped RQ5 from the final report because it was not sufficiently informative and to reduce the length of the manuscript.

## RQ1

### Major Changes

* Hellinger's distance was dropped from the analyses as testing found that results were highly sensitive to the choice of kernel density estimator.
* The standardised root mean squared residual (SRMR) was dropped from the analyses — instead, we present differences between each pairwise correlation.
* We compare correlations between variables instead of covariances.


### Minor Changes

* We dropped the following variables from the analyses: twin genetic problems (agenpro1/2), mother/father social class (amoclass/afaclass), mother/father has a job (amojob/afajob), mother/father needs special qualification for job (amospq/afaspq).

## RQ2

### Major Changes

* We added baseline maternal education as an outcome variable.
* We added four adolescent outcomes (depression, externalising, cognitive ability and GCSE scores) as outcome variables.
* As with RQ1, we omitted Hellinger's distance and SRMR from the models, and compared correlations instead of covariances.


### Minor Changes

* Instead of using IP weights fitted to model participation at a given timepoint, we used IP weights fitted to model missingness in each variable or pair of variables.
* We increased the number of imputed datasets to 100.
